home.title: Software Engineer & Game Developer
home.subtitle: I develop software across platforms, from Unity games to web apps.

escape.title: Escape the Void
escape.desc: A bullet-heaven game developed during a 2-week game jam using Unity and C#.

trainer.title: Trainer — A Portal Supporting Programming Education
trainer.desc: A web-based educational portal supporting programming education for students and teachers. My bachelor thesis adds a static analysis feature for C/C++ code within the platform. Built with Kotlin/Spring on the backend and Node/Vue3/Vuetify3 for the frontend.

space.title: Space Ride
space.desc: A 2D space game implemented in C++ with SDL2, supporting native execution and WebAssembly deployment for the web.
